Balenciaga 2025SS summer new idea printed short-sleeve T-shirt, made of vintage flat knit fabric using 24S double yarn vintage flat knit fabric, 185g; paired with 32S double yarn 1*1 rib, 270g. The 24S fabric is a medium-coarse yarn suitable for creating thick and stiff fabric with a slightly rough texture, meeting the vintage style's pursuit of a "natural primitive" effect. The fabric is soft, breathable, and slightly elastic, suitable for close-fitting wear, shaping a simple and smooth silhouette. The garment features distressed texture, faded treatment, and classic tailoring to embody a retro loose silhouette design. The front is adorned with the brand logo, printed with high-density dot matrix ink printing, a unique and high-end printing technique that produces patterns with high clarity and resolution due to the dense distribution of dots. Utilizing this technique, various complex patterns and textures can be printed on clothing, such as the ink graffiti-style letter print, which has a unique texture and three-dimensionality. The crackle print technique uses imported crackle paste material for color adjustment, printed on fabric with silk screen for a transparent base color fixation. The crackle paste is printed on the fabric through silk screen, creating irregular crackle effects upon drying, resembling patterns on a turtle shell, hence the name crackle paste. The proportion of crackle white and crackle transparent, as well as the thickness of the printed paste layer, are adjusted to control the effect. Additionally, due to the raised edges after cracking, the finished garment can be pressed and ironed to enhance stability. The garment features all-over distressed design with irregular holes, adding a rebellious destroyed design sense to the simple clothing. The stone wash process is used for targeted distressing, employing a laser positioning technique for manual distressing and abrasion effects. Each distressing area is handcrafted to achieve the most harmonious visual effect of natural wear on the fabric, presenting a rich vintage vibe after stone washing. The high-neck oversize loose fit features a loose silhouette design with a basic round neck, dropped shoulder line, vertical rib knit from top to bottom, ribbed cuffs, and hem for a gathered effect, and longer sleeves for added detail. The garment maintains consistent thickness with the original version and undergoes shaping treatment for a sturdy and non-deformable fit. Sizes available: XS-L.
